content: The intrinsic reward signals that power curiosity-driven methods like ICM and RND can be repurposed as a dynamic sampling gate for active learning agent memory, where the agent only retains episodic memory traces that trigger high intrinsic surprise, rather than storing all encountered experiences. This creates a self-pruning memory system that aligns memory acquisition with the agent’s own inherent exploration priorities.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
